When does enrollment start?: Exact enrollment dates are posted on the URO Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/SLU.URO. Generally, the 1st Semester starts enrolling in August, the 2nd Semester in January, and Short Term Courses in June
How can I view my grades?: You can view your grades by clicking on 'Grades' tab on the left panel.
Where can I find the academic calendar?: The academic calendar can be found at the home page in the "Events, News & Announcements" board.
How do I update my personal details?: To update personal details navigate to the 'Personal Details' tabs on left side panel.
How do I start the enrollment process?:
You can begin your enrollment through either online or in-person methods.

Online Enrollment:
1. Navigate to the 'Enrollment' tab on your assigned date via the SLU Student Portal
2. Enter your personal and academic information
3. Select your courses and sections
4. Review the tuition fee breakdown
5. Make your payment through payment at the university cashier using cash, credit, or debit cards, or through online options such as GCash, Dragonpay, UPAY or bank deposit
6. Allow up to two working days for processing
7. Confirm your enrollment status on the portal

Visit the SLU SAMCIS Facebook page at https://www.facebook.com/SLU.bravoSAMCIS/ for updates.

In-Person Enrollment:
1. Go to the SLU Devesse Plaza lobby at Maryheights Campus within the enrollment period
2. Obtain the required forms from the enrollment officer and fill them out
3. Submit the filled forms to the officer for verification
4. The officer will confirm your enrollment status
5. Check your student portal for updates, then complete the payment to finalize your enrollment
How can I settle my tuition payment?:
You can settle your tuition payment either online or in person:

Online Payment:
1. Navigate to the 'Statement of Accounts' section in your student portal
2. Select a payment method such as Dragonpay, UPAY, BDO Bills Payment, or Bukas Loan
3. Follow the on-screen instructions to complete the transaction
4. Save your payment receipt for your records

In-Person Payment:
1. Visit the SLU Main Campus Cashier at Windows 9-12
2. Choose your preferred payment method: cash, check, or debit/credit card (Window 11 for card payments)
3. Complete the payment process and obtain your receipt

Where is the enrollment venue for irregu: Irregular students should enroll at Devesse Plaza.
Where do irregular students enroll?: Irregular students enroll at Devesse Plaza.
Where do regular students enroll?: Regular students enroll through the Student Portal.
What is the enrollment venue for regular:
The enrollment venue depends on the student type:

1. Irregular students enroll at Devesse Plaza.
2. Regular students enroll through the Student Portal.
Where can I find available subjects?: Available subjects can be found on the Student Portal under the `Curriculum Checklist` tab.
Where can I see available subjects?: You can see available subjects on the Student Portal under the `Curriculum Checklist` tab.
